title: Remastered Death Messages
description: RDM edits the vanilla death messages to include jokes to make death a little less rude.
body:
# Remastered Death Messages
Remastered Death Messages is a resource pack focused on Minecraft's Death Messages, which changes almost every single one of them.

<details>
<summary>Origin of my perfect resource pack</summary>

I was playing Minecraft until I died, and then I realized, "_Wow, Minecraft's death messages are so bland. Who came up with this?_" I then realized, it was fate. I was determined to make a pack that fixes this so no more people would have to read these PUTRID death messages.

</details>

## Installation 
Simply drag and drop the `.zip` file into your `*\minecraft\resourcepacks\` folder and enable it in the in-game resource packs menu.

This pack works on a fully Vanilla instance, meaning no mods are required.

This pack should also be compatible with every other Minecraft pack, excluding those that edit the death messages.

[![Check out the gallery!](https://i.imgur.com/lWD9AL9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/remastered-death-messages/gallery)
### Texture Packs used in the gallery:
- [qrafty's Capitalized Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/qraftys-capitalized-font)
- [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark)
